title: Bombay High Court grants bail to POCSO convict in jail for last 10 years
description: The Bombay High Court recently suspended the 20-year prison sentence of a man convicted by a trial court under the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act for the sexual assault of a 5-year-old girl [Mehtab Aalam Aabid Ali Ansari v. State of Maharashtra & Anr.]Justice RM Joshi passed the order on February 11 while hearing the bail application of a man who has been in jail for the past 10 years.The man was convicted by the trial court in 2016 and his appeal against the same is
